description: Style NoteA brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for purses. Available to you in a variety of designs and colours at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, these pouches  are a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge.Product DetailsTeal coloured sling bagHas flaps with snap button closure on both sidesOne main zippered compartmentTeal coloured detachable sling   Zip pockets on both the flapsOne pocket with zip closure on the backMaterial and CareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust      SizeHeight: 12 cmWidth: 18 cmDepth: 3 cm
